variants.rationale: Increase post_years to capture longer-term effects, potentially improving power by including more post-treatment data.
Reduce pre_years to 3 to focus on a shorter pre-treatment period, which may reduce noise from older data and affect detectability.
Increase n_treated to 35 to improve power by increasing sample size of treated units.
Increase effect_grid_end to 0.08 and effect_grid_step to 0.005 to explore a wider and coarser effect size grid, potentially reducing computation while testing larger effects.
